# List of Sugar-Dusted Strains (Heavy Trichome Genetics)
by Nebula Haze
Looks aren’t everything… but sometimes you want something sparkly to show off. Potency isn’t the whole story. Looks and smells affect the cannabis experience. And it’s always nice to have envy-inducing buds.
How do you grow buds that look like this? The answer is in the [genetics](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64).
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/pacific-punch-trichome-bud-sm.jpg)
## Choose a Strain That Naturally Grows Lots of Trichomes
The most important factor when it comes to the sparkle of your buds is genetics. Some strains get covered in sugar, while others don’t produce many visible trichomes. This isn’t an indicator of quality. I’ve had glitter-covered buds that had very weak effects (there are even no-THC strains that produce a lot of trichomes) and strains with no visible trichomes that sent me soaring to the moon for hours. However, sparkly buds are super trendy right now, and there are many outstanding choices that give you a glittery appearance and captivating effects at the same time.
These plants were grown together in the same setup. The buds are the exact same age and stage of development. Look at the difference in trichomes based purely on genetics:
[Maui Wowie](https://seedsupreme.com/maui-wowie-feminized.html#grower) produces excellent buds with lovely effects, but not much sparkle.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/cola-not-many-trichomes.jpg)
In contrast, a strain like [Mandarin Cookies](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/mandarin-cookies-v2-feminised-seeds-etho-macov2-fem?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) goes all-in with sparkle.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/cola-very-sparkly-with-trichomes-sm.jpg)
Tips for Finding Glittery Genetics
  * Look at pictures of the strain online so you know what to expect (learn [how to research strains](https://www.growweedeasy.com/find-strain)).
  * [American genetics](https://www.growweedeasy.com/best-american-cannabis-seed-bank-in-usa) tend to have higher trichome production than European strains, though not always.
  * Care for plants properly to get the most out of the genetics (more info below).

Today I’ll share some strains that produce lots of trichomes as well as great effects.
## Peyote Critical
[Peyote Critical](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/peyote-critical-feminised-seeds-bfs-peycrit-fem?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) produces great yields, sparkle, and potency. Easy to grow and fast-to-finish flowering. The perfect beginner strain.
[](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/peyote-critical-feminised-seeds-bfs-peycrit-fem?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64)
## Bruce Banner
This strain combines trichome-heavy genetics with big yields and strong potency.
This version of [Bruce Banner](https://seedsupreme.com/bruce-banner-feminized.html#grower) has been stabilized to produce hardy, high-yielding plants covered in big sparkly buds.
[](https://seedsupreme.com/bruce-banner-feminized.html#grower)
## Purple Punch
This strain is a hybrid that includes Larry OG and Grand Daddy Purple. It has that perfect mix of fruity sweet smell and dense, potent buds. Plants tend to stay short to medium sized, and are hardy enough to handle a bit of stress without a problem.
[Purple Punch](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/purple-punch/ref/63951/) is a crowd pleaser with its sweet smell, high potency, and beautiful sparkly buds.
[](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/purple-punch-feminised-seeds-bfs-purpunch-fem?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64)
## Pineapple Chunk
[Pineapple Chunk](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/pineapple-chunk-feminised-seeds-barneys-pineapple-fem?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) – I’ve grown this strain many times and it always comes out outstanding in appearance, taste, smell, and potency.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/trichome-covered-pineapple-chunk-es300-led-grow-light.jpg)
## Most American Genetics
[American genetics](https://www.growweedeasy.com/best-american-cannabis-seed-bank-in-usa) tend to have high trichome production, though it can be hit or miss. In the US, lots of seeds available for purchase are random crosses (seed “drops) and not consistent strains.
## Mandarin Cookies
[Mandarin Cookies](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/mandarin-cookies-v2-feminised-seeds-etho-macov2-fem?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) by Ethos Genetics is one of my favorite strains. Buds are just something else when it comes to how they smell, look, and especially the effects.
[Mandarin Cookies](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/mandarin-cookies-v2-feminised-seeds-etho-macov2-fem?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) produces incredible trichome-covered buds
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/04/mandarin-cookies-bud-macro-hlg-300-led-grown.jpg)
## Purple Urkle
[Purple Urkle X](https://northatlanticseed.com/product/purple-urkle-x-f/ref/63951/) is bred from Mendocino Purps with the intention to create a truly outstanding smell with high potency. Relaxing strain with gorgeous purple-tinted buds.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/purple-urkle-nug.jpg)
## Wedding Cake
[Wedding Cake](https://seedsupreme.com/wedding-cake-feminized.html#grower) buds may stay green, but if given a lot of light, the buds often take on shades of purple like the ones pictured here. This strain make beautiful, sparkly buds that smell sweet and have high potency
[Wedding Cake](https://seedsupreme.com/wedding-cake-feminized.html#grower) buds may turn purple if they receive high levels of light.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/grow-room-flowering-almost-harvest-purple-Wedding-Cake-and-Do-Si-Dos-33-Barneys-Farm.jpg)
## Autoflowering Strains
Now let’s look at some examples of cannabis [autoflowering strains](https://www.growweedeasy.com/2024-guide-to-cannabis-auto-flowering-strains).
## THC Bomb Auto
[THC Bomb Auto](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/thc-bomb-auto/ref/63951/) (an [autoflowering strain](https://www.growweedeasy.com/why-beginners-should-grow-auto-flowering-strains)) lives up to its name
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/thc-bomb-buds-grown-under-hps-1.jpg) [](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/11/thc-bomb-trichomes-closeup.jpg)
## Amnesia Haze Auto
[Amnesia Haze Auto](https://www.marijuana-seeds.nl/auto-amnesia-femnized?cmid=YXlCZ1hYSDc1dlE9&afid=LzRPWWQ5bzhMRWM9&ats=M0hKbmd5c0Y4WEk9) (autoflowering) by MSNL produced excellent yields, smelled like a dream, and had trichomes everywhere!
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/01/msnl-amnesia-grown-under-viparspectra-leds-11-weeks-2.jpg) [](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/01/msnl-amnesia-hps-grow-light-11-weeks-2.jpg)
## Cinderella Jack Auto
[Cinderella Jack Auto](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/cinderella-jack-auto-feminised-seeds-dp-auto-cinderella-jack?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) (autoflowering) by Dutch Passion produce outstanding potency and trichome production
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/dutch-passion-cinderella-jack-auto.jpg)
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/cinderella-jack-auto-dutch-passion-sm.jpg)
## Zkittlez Auto
Whenever I grow [Zkittlez Auto](https://seedsupreme.com/zkittlez-autoflower.html#grower), I’m impressed at the yields, ease of growth, and overall sparkle of the buds.
[Zkittlez Auto](https://seedsupreme.com/zkittlez-autoflower.html#grower) is an easy, heavy trichome autoflowering strains.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/zkittlez-auto-closeup-cola-trichomes.jpg)
## How to Increase Trichomes with _Any_ Strain
### Grow Lights
  * **LEDs** – Each model produces somewhat different plant growth and bud development. I’ve grown with a few blurple LEDs and several quantum board LEDs, and as of this writing, I really like the Mars Hydro LED lights: for example the [TSL2000](https://www.amazon.com/MARS-HYDRO-Spectrum-Hydroponic-Fixtures/dp/B07PLZLKVM?crid=39MGDDKG2G0I3&keywords=2x4+led+grow+light+mars&qid=1699051697&s=lawn-garden&sprefix=2x4+led+grow+light+mar%2Clawngarden%2C156&sr=1-4&ufe=app_do%3Aamzn1.fos.c3015c4a-46bb-44b9-81a4-dc28e6d374b3&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=70a7a7bcf9e8395839ccb3e670f450de&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) for a 2×4 tent or a [FC-E4800](https://www.amazon.com/MARS-HYDRO-FC-E4800-Commercial-Detachable/dp/B08Q3B22X7?crid=2N6QPHPHSREMT&keywords=4x4%2Bled%2Bgrow%2Blight%2Bmars&qid=1699052279&s=lawn-garden&sprefix=x4%2Bled%2Bgrow%2Blight%2Bmars%2Clawngarden%2C126&sr=1-5&th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=871408b2169c653e5eb390e3b23ea5d0&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) for a 4×4 tent. Here is a regularly-updated list of my [current favorite LEDs for growing cannabis](https://www.growweedeasy.com/5-best-led-grow-lights-2025-cannabis-yields-speed-bud-quality) with a breakdown of the pros and cons for each model. LEDs seem to get the best results with temperatures around 79-82°F (26-28°F). [Let us know](https://www.growweedeasy.com/website-feedback) which LED grow light has produced the most trichomes for you.
  * **HPS** – [HPS grow lights](https://www.growweedeasy.com/what-type-high-pressure-sodium-hps-grow-lights-old) produce excellent trichome production as long it’s not hot or humid. HPS seems to get the best bud quality and trichome production with temperatures around 74-79°F (24-26°F). Since HPS lights produce a lot of heat and plants respond best at cooler temperatures, they are the perfect grow light in winter or any situation where you would otherwise need a heater to keep plants warm enough.
  * **CMH/LEC** – There are different bulbs you can use in this type of fixture, and they produce different results. The “vegetative” bulbs (like the [Philips 4200k “blue” bulb](https://www.amazon.com/PHILIPS-901573-Master-Color-Elite/dp/B00HXOJ0UC/ref=as_li_ss_tl?dchild=1&keywords=philips+cmh&qid=1602976395&sr=8-4&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=0d79c8a5dee7ec6a796134e2c423f17e&language=en_US)) can be used from seed to harvest, including in the flowering stage. Although this lowers yields compared to using the “flowering” or 3100k bulb, it amps up trichome and terpene production (likely due to increased UV light). The CMH flowering/3100k bulb produces amazing yields but has not produced an above-average amount of trichomes when I’ve used it. [See an experiment](https://www.growweedeasy.com/lec-vs-led-grow-lights-side-by-side-journal).
  * **Blue and especially UV light** seems to contribute to the creation more trichomes. Always wear [eye protection](https://www.growweedeasy.com/indoor-growers-consider-your-eyes) around UV light sources!

I’ve had great trichome production under the LED grow lights. This is how [Power Africa](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/search/Power%20Africa?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) reacted to the light.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/power-africa-seedsman-trichomes.jpg)
HPS grow lights produce excellent trichome production as long as it’s not too hot or humid. These autoflowering plants were grown under a [250W HPS](https://www.growweedeasy.com/viparspectra-leds-vs-hps-grow-journal-1-pound-harvest) (from top left going clockwise: Purple Chem Auto, [THC Bomb Auto](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/thc-bomb-auto/ref/63951/), Purple Roc Berry Auto, OG Kush Auto).
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/11/colorful-buds-in-hps-tent.jpg)
CMH/LEC grow lights with a 4k bulb produce the most trichomes of any light I’ve tried so far. In [some tests](https://www.growweedeasy.com/lec-vs-led-grow-lights-side-by-side-journal), it also seems to produce a high level of terpenes compared to other grow lights.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/05/trichomes-cmh-grow-light.jpg)
### **Environment**
I touched a little on the environment when talking about the different grow lights but here’s more on what you can do to help produce as many trichomes as possible.
  * **Not Hot** – Keep a comfortable temperature (it shouldn’t feel hot or cold to you) while buds are forming. Especially don’t let it get hot during the last 2 weeks before harvest
  * **Low Humidity** – Keep humidity under 60% in the late flowering stage
  * **Strong Light** – Lights should be bright but not so much plants get [light stress](https://www.growweedeasy.com/cannabis-plant-problems/light-burn)
  * **No Nutrient Deficiencies** – Plants tend to produce the most trichomes when they’re getting enough [nutrients](https://www.growweedeasy.com/nutrients) to stay healthy. Plants that suffer from [nutrient deficiencies](https://www.growweedeasy.com/cannabis-symptoms-pictures) tend to grow less-sparkly buds.
  * **Low Nitrogen in Late Flowering** – Nutrients should be designed specifically for bloom/flowering. These nutrients have less Nitrogen than Phosphorus/Potassium. Nitrogen is important at every stage of life, so it shouldn’t be completely cut out, but too much Nitrogen in the second half of the flowering stage can reduce trichome development and keep buds smaller.
  * **Supplement with UV light** – Some growers add extra UV light during the last two weeks before harvest. This can increase trichome development but watch out for [foxtails](https://www.growweedeasy.com/foxtails), [herms](https://www.growweedeasy.com/cannabis-plant-problems/male-plants-hermies-bananas), or [bleaching](https://www.growweedeasy.com/cannabis-plant-problems/light-burn).

[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2015/11/cannabis-leaf-grow-tent.jpg)
### “Good” Plant Stress
Some strategies to stress plants may increase trichome production.
  * **[Supercropping](https://www.growweedeasy.com/how-to-super-crop-marijuana)** – Bending/snapping plants in a way that stresses them without “breaking the skin” (if done right this can increase yields, too)
  * **Other Physical Stress** – I’ve heard of growers cutting leaves and putting nails though stems the last day or two before harvest. The later option makes me sad ?
  * **Give 24-48 hours of darkness just before harvest** – Be careful because if you don’t have a lot of green healthy leaves, this may discolor your buds.
  * **Water plants with ice water just before harvest** – I’ve heard of some growers giving plants icy water just before harvest to try to shock their roots. Again, this is an unproven method…

[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2010/05/ultimate-supercrop-bending-lst-example.jpg)
### Trichome-Increasing Supplements
Some supplements claim to actually increase either the number of trichomes on your buds, or the potency of your buds. Although there are lots of “snake oil” products out there in the supplement world, some supplements have proven themselves time and again.
[Rhizoflora Terpinator](https://amzn.to/2bt0FJv) is one of the most popular supplements to help increase trichome production and is used by both hobbyist and commercial growers to increase both the number of trichomes and terpene (smell) production. There are probably other great supplements that do this, too, but this particular one has been tried and tested by many real cannabis growers.
Just be careful. Overdoing it with Terpinator can cause [foxtails](https://www.growweedeasy.com/foxtails), [herms](https://www.growweedeasy.com/cannabis-plant-problems/male-plants-hermies-bananas), or even kill your plants in extreme cases. This supplement works by stressing your plant in a way that increases tichomes, but too much stress is a bad thing. Use as directed!
[Rhizoflora Terpinator](https://amzn.to/2bt0FJv) can be an effective supplement. Just be careful not to go overboard!
[](https://www.amazon.com/Rhizoflora-Terpinator-1-Liter/dp/B00K60JALE/ref=as_li_ss_il?s=lawn-garden&ie=UTF8&qid=1471685282&sr=1-1&keywords=Terpinator&linkCode=li2&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=a2096b38f18eabed74b47714417cd4d4)

GrowWeedEasy.com was [founded in 2010](https://www.growweedeasy.com/about) by Nebula Haze and Sirius Fourside. Featured in _High Times_ , Ed Rosenthal’s books, _Cannabis Business Times_ , and _Skunk Magazine_ , GrowWeedEasy.com is the **#1 free resource in the world** for learning how to grow cannabis at home. Our simple step-by-step tutorials make it easy for anyone to grow great weed. **[Sign up for our free newsletter](https://www.growweedeasy.com/message/news)** to get grow tips delivered every Sunday at 4:20 AM.
